items.name_en: New YSL Birkin Tote with Care quilting|||Black and Caramel, I can do this winter again!
items.name_cn:
New YSL Birkin Tote with Care quilting|||Black and Caramel, I can do this winter again!
The most popular tote of the year is definitely this one.
The capacity is really friendly, and carrying a big bag in winter really gives off a great vibe!
Sisters, I want the Black and Caramel, both colors are too beautiful. The YSL tote has a striking large logo, very individual and really beautiful.
Size 54x36. Model 8818

items.name_en: New YSL Classic Tote, a fashion mainstay🌟|||🔥This YSL classic tote is simply the king of fashion! It makes you instantly look like a fashionista!😍
items.name_cn:
New YSL Classic Tote, a fashion mainstay🌟|||🔥This YSL classic tote is simply the king of fashion! It makes you instantly look like a fashionista!😍
1️⃣First, the design is truly classic! Stylish yet timeless, which is rare. 👜
2️⃣The material is excellent, comfortable to the touch, and feels very high-quality. 👝
3️⃣The space is large enough to hold many daily essentials, such as a phone, wallet, keys, etc. 📱🏺
4️⃣The strap length is suitable; it can be worn over the shoulder or crossbody, very convenient.
5️⃣There are many color choices, suitable for various styles and occasions. The starry grey I got is super versatile! ✨
🔥Overall, this YSL classic tote is a very worthy fashion item! Whether matching outfits or as a daily bag, it is very suitable. 👗👚👠. Dimensions 25x15x8, Style No. 80993

items.name_en: New YSL Saint Laurent Niki Shopping Commuter Bag is the one
items.name_cn:
New YSL Saint Laurent Niki Shopping Commuter Bag is the one
No need to hype up the YSL Niki Shopping bag
The chain is adjustable so it can expand to a large size
Fits a 13-inch laptop, iPad, and the body is classic Niki waxed leather, durable and sturdy, definitely the first choice for commuting and business trips. Dimensions 32x26x10, Style No. 9588

items.name_en: New YSL|Shopping Bag|||Saint Laurent's classic Shopping Bag is here [Like]
items.name_cn:
New YSL|Shopping Bag|||Saint Laurent's classic Shopping Bag is here [Like]
Very soft cowhide material, wear and scratch resistant~ Lightweight and versatile~ For those needing a commuter bag, this is a great choice~[Chuckle]
Simple body with no obvious large logo, a small logo on the leather pull tab is very exquisite~ Comes with a zip pocket inside for storage [Like]
Fits a 13-inch laptop, though it is a fashion bag, occasional laptop use is fine [Cute (Plain) Size 47x31x11, Model 600281

items.name_cn:
Niki_22cm Elephant Grain Suede
Unisex salt-style college aesthetic shoulder and crossbody bag
Lightweight and soft lambskin, overall low-key luxury and versatile. The commuter shape works for both casual and salt styles. Black with black logo, the design is more minimalist. Shoulder strap is not detachable, easy to style.
If you like it, you can definitely get it. A timeless style.
Model: 633151 Elephant Grain
Size: 22×16.5×12cm

items.name_cn:
Nude Pink·
SOLFERINO BOX_23cm
A must-have bestseller that has conquered the entire fashion world upon release. Nostalgic Left Bank, inspired by the Rue De Solferino in Paris! The bag uses original factory patent leather cowhide, offering excellent texture and flexibility! The interior features a three-layer accordion pocket, easily accommodating daily essentials. The newly designed "L" letter top-half opening clasp completely redefines your perception of bag clasps, making you exclaim in amazement—bags can actually open like this, it's simply too fun!
Model: 634305
Size: 23x16x6cm

items.name_cn:
Oatmeal hand-rubbed leather·SAC DE JOUR 26cm
The most elegant SAC DE JOUR series, a timeless classic. Exquisite hand-rubbed cowhide with clear texture and a full luster, very luxurious! Comes with a middle divider inside the 26cm, can be removed to use as a clutch, and the shoulder strap is adjustable to choose your preferred length. The logo is very small, perfectly interpreting the style of understated luxury~
Model: 421863/477477
Size: 26x20.5x12.5cm
(Comes with a middle divider inside the 26cm)

specs.rawTitle:

items.name_cn:
Ochre Suede
PARIS VII Small Suede HOBO Bag
Cowhide drawstring closure, featuring the iconic CASSANDRE pendant, matching suede lining.
This bag is elegant and soft, comes with a card holder and adjustable shoulder strap, offering a personalized wearing style.
Size: 30×25×3cm
Model: 796626
